raw_signal: LineWise (YC X25) Raises $1.1M Pre-Seed Funding to End Costly Factory Downtime and Yield Loss. LineWise, the US-based AI-powered virtual engineer for manufacturers, has raised $1.1 million in pre-seed funding from A2D Ventures, Y Combinator, Exitfund, REMUS Capital, SBXi Fund, and Team Ignite Ventures.
